description: browser-core analyze module and bw analyze subcommand with domain frequency analysis
steps: Add url = '2' to [workspace.dependencies] in root Cargo.toml
Add url = { workspace = true } to crates/browser-core/Cargo.toml [dependencies]
Create crates/browser-core/src/analyze.rs with rare_domains(events: &[BrowserEvent], cap: usize) -> Vec<(String, usize)>
Add pub mod analyze; to crates/browser-core/src/lib.rs
rare_domains: count URL domains from attrs['url'], return domains with count <= cap, sorted by count ascending
Use url::Url::parse() to extract domain from URL string
Test in analyze.rs: rare_domains_empty_events returns empty
Test: rare_domains_below_cap_returned — 1 visit to rare.example.com with cap=5 returns it
Test: rare_domains_above_cap_excluded — 10 visits to popular.com with cap=5 returns empty
Test: rare_domains_sorted_by_count_ascending — domain with count=1 appears before count=2
bw analyze <chrome_history_path> exits 0 and prints domains
